name: persona-distill
description: Persona Distillation Ecosystem — a parameterized schema library + generation/evaluation/scheduling/debate toolkit for distilling personas (people or rule systems) into self-contained Claude Code skills. 5 skills (distill-meta, persona-judge, distill-collector, persona-router, persona-debate), 9 persona schemas (self/collaborator/mentor/loved-one/friend/public-mirror/public-domain/topic/executor), 18 reusable components.
